sentences.ja: りんごは 一つしか ありません。

entries.mnemonic: A single horizontal stroke = ONE.

sentences.ja: バスで 二十ぷん かかります。
お水を 二つ おねがいします。

entries.mnemonic: Two horizontal strokes = TWO.

sentences.ja: 本を 三さつ 読みました。

entries.mnemonic: Three horizontal strokes = THREE.

sentences.ja: 土ようびは 一時から 四時までです。
中国人は 四人で、かんこく人も 四人 います。

entries.mnemonic: Four legs (儿) inside a box = FOUR.

sentences.ja: シロは 五さいです。
じかんは 五時から 九時までです。

entries.mnemonic: Roman numeral V tilted between two horizontal lines = FIVE.

sentences.ja: 父も 六時に 来ます。

entries.mnemonic: A lid (亠) over a split (八) = SIX.

sentences.ja: えいがは 七時はんに はじまります。

entries.mnemonic: A horizontal stroke crossed by a hook = SEVEN.

sentences.ja: でも、電車が おくれて、八時十分に 学校に つきました。

日にち：八月一日から 八月七日まで
時間：あさ 十時から よる 八時まで
本は ぜんぶ 半分の ねだんです。

entries.mnemonic: Two strokes splitting outward like a fan = EIGHT.

look_alike.diff: two strokes TOUCH at the top (one continuous V); 八 strokes are separate
left stroke has an upward hook; 八 strokes are short and separate

sentences.ja: じかんは 五時から 九時までです。

entries.mnemonic: A diagonal hook curling like the digit 9 = NINE.
entries.stroke_order_mistakes: 左払い→曲線で下まで一筆。2画ではなく1画＋1画。

sentences.ja: バスで 二十ぷん かかります。

entries.mnemonic: A plus sign - Roman numeral X rotated = TEN.

sentences.ja: B: 千五百円でした。
この 本は 千五百円です。

entries.mnemonic: One (一) over white (白) = a HUNDRED whitewashed walls.

sentences.ja: あの 大きい 本は 二千円です。

entries.mnemonic: A slash (丿) over ten (十) = a THOUSAND tally marks.

look_alike.diff: TWO horizontal strokes (top + middle); 千 has only ONE plus a 丿
THREE horizontal strokes (king); 千 has 1 + 丿
THREE horizontal + 点 (dot) = "ball / jewel"
top stroke is a 丿 (slash going LEFT); 千 top stroke goes RIGHT

sentences.ja: 五万円 あります。

entries.mnemonic: A swooping line tied off = TEN THOUSAND.

sentences.ja: 5,000円くらいです。

entries.mnemonic: Inside the box (冂) is earth (土) = round YEN coin.

sentences.ja: 友だちが 来る 日
日本語の 先生です。

entries.mnemonic: A box with a stroke inside = the SUN, a DAY.

look_alike.diff: TWO horizontal strokes inside the box (vs 日 = 一 stroke)
has a 丿 (slash) on top of the box

sentences.ja: 今は 4月です。
あいています：月〜金の 9時から 17時まで。

entries.mnemonic: A crescent shape = the MOON, a MONTH.

sentences.ja: 女: 火よう日と 木よう日です。

entries.mnemonic: Flames flickering upward = FIRE.

sentences.ja: 月よう日と 水よう日と 金よう日に カフェで アルバイトを して います。

entries.mnemonic: A central drop with splashes = WATER.

sentences.ja: 木の つくえです。
sentences.translation_en: It is a wooden desk. (noun-modifier の: links a material to an object)

entries.mnemonic: A trunk with branches and roots = TREE.

look_alike.diff: extra short horizontal stroke at the base = "origin / book"
extra horizontal stroke at the TOP, short = "end / extremity"
extra horizontal stroke at the TOP, longer than 末 = "not yet"

examples.gloss: golden time / sweet potato dish (named after a folk hero)

sentences.ja: お金が ないので、買えません。
sentences.translation_en: I have no money, so I can't buy it.

entries.mnemonic: A person (人) over a king (王) with two specks of gold = METAL/GOLD.

examples.gloss: on top of the dirt / on the ground

sentences.ja: 土曜日は ともだちと サッカーを します。

entries.mnemonic: A cross stuck in the ground = EARTH.

sentences.ja: 日曜日は そうじしたり、せんたくしたり します。

entries.mnemonic: Sun (日) + feathers (羽) + bird (隹) - DAY OF THE WEEK named after a celestial body.

examples.reading: まいとし / まいねん
examples.gloss: every year (まいとし is more common in conversation; まいねん in formal/written contexts)

entries.mnemonic: A stalk grown over time = a YEAR.

entries.mnemonic: Sun (日) + temple (寺, time-keeper) = TIME / hour.
entries.stroke_order_mistakes: 日偏→寺（3画＋3画）。寺の最初は土ではなく上に１画。

sentences.ja: 10分ぐらい かかります。
1日に 30分ずつ べんきょうします。

entries.mnemonic: Splitting (八) with a knife (刀) = MINUTE / divide.

sentences.ja:
日にち：八月一日から 八月七日まで
時間：あさ 十時から よる 八時まで
本は ぜんぶ 半分の ねだんです。

entries.mnemonic: Mark cutting in two = HALF.

entries.mnemonic: A person under a roof at this very instant = NOW.

examples.reading: まいとし / まいねん
examples.gloss: every year (まいとし is more common in conversation; まいねん in formal/written contexts)

sentences.ja: わたしは 毎日 6時に おきます。
毎日 あさ こうえんで はしります。

entries.mnemonic: A person (人) over a mother (母) - every child has one = EVERY.

sentences.ja: 今は 一週間に 二かい、ピアノきょうしつに 行きます。

entries.mnemonic: Walking (辶) around (周) the calendar = WEEK.

sentences.ja: <u>午前</u> くじに がっこうへ いきます。

entries.mnemonic: A pestle pointing down at noon = NOON.

look_alike.diff: top stroke goes RIGHT (丿 sweep); 午 top stroke goes LEFT

sentences.ja: 何時に きましたか。

entries.mnemonic: A person (亻) asking what is possible (可) = WHAT.
entries.stroke_order_mistakes: 人偏→可（口の上に丁）。可の中の口は最後でなく真ん中。

sentences.ja: おすしを たべる 人
べんきょうしない 人。

entries.mnemonic: Two legs walking = a PERSON.

look_alike.diff: left stroke goes UP-then-down (like an arrow entering from the right); 人 left stroke goes straight down-left
two short separate strokes that do NOT touch at the top

sentences.ja: 男の人と 女の人が 話しています。

entries.mnemonic: Power (力) in the rice field (田) = MAN.

entries.mnemonic: A figure with crossed legs sitting gracefully = WOMAN.

examples.gloss: child (often written こども in everyday text)

sentences.ja: こうえんに 子どもが いますか。

entries.mnemonic: A baby with arms outstretched and swaddled = CHILD.

entries.mnemonic: Two crossing strokes - paternal authority figure = FATHER.

entries.mnemonic: Two breasts inside a body = MOTHER.

entries.mnemonic: Two hands clasped = FRIEND.

entries.mnemonic: A person (儿) striding ahead = PREVIOUS / earlier.

entries.mnemonic: A plant sprouting from the soil = LIFE / birth.

entries.mnemonic: Five fingers spreading from a wrist = HAND.

entries.mnemonic: Mouth-shape (口) over stop (止) = FOOT (where you stop).

has a 丿 on top + ONE inside stroke

entries.mnemonic: A flexed arm muscle = POWER.

entries.mnemonic: A line at the root of a tree (木) = ORIGIN / book.

extra stroke is at TOP not BASE = "end"
extra stroke is at TOP, longer = "not yet"

entries.mnemonic: A jewel (玉) inside borders (囗) = COUNTRY.

ヤマダさんへ

entries.mnemonic: People (人) gathering in clouds (云) = MEET.

entries.mnemonic: Mouth (口) over shell-money (貝) - a paid speaker = MEMBER / employee.

entries.mnemonic: A person with arms stretched wide = BIG.

look_alike.diff: 点 (dot) above the right shoulder = "dog"
点 (dot) inside the lower triangle = "thick / fat"

entries.mnemonic: A line through the middle of a box = MIDDLE.

sentences.ja: ねこは いぬより 小さいです。

entries.mnemonic: Three small specks scattered = SMALL.

entries.mnemonic: A mark above the baseline = UP.

has an extra horizontal stroke + 一 base = "correct"

entries.mnemonic: A mark below the baseline = DOWN.

entries.mnemonic: A hand (ナ) over a mouth (口) - natural right-hand bite = RIGHT.
entries.stroke_order_mistakes: 左払い（ノ）→横→口の順。「左」と書き順が異なる（左は横→ノ→工）。

entries.mnemonic: A traveler (彳) trailing behind = AFTER.

entries.mnemonic: Sun (日) rising behind a tree (木) = EAST.

sentences.translation_en: The school is to the west.

entries.mnemonic: A bird returning to its nest at sunset = WEST.

sentences.translation_en: I went to a southern country.

sentences.translation_en: I can see a tall mountain.

entries.mnemonic: A grid of irrigation channels = RICE PADDY.

entries.mnemonic: The biggest thing (大) under the line (一) = HEAVEN / sky.

sentences.ja: 天気は とても よかったです。

entries.mnemonic: Steam (气) rising = SPIRIT / mood / air.

sentences.ja: 先生に 花を あげました。
sentences.translation_en: I gave flowers to the teacher.

entries.mnemonic: Grass (艹) transforming (化) = FLOWER.

sentences.ja: 空が 青いです。

entries.mnemonic: A cave (穴) of work (工) - empty above = SKY / empty.

sentences.ja: でも、電車が おくれて、八時十分に 学校に つきました。

sentences.ja: でも、電車が おくれて、八時十分に 学校に つきました。

examples_corpus_constraint.note: ISSUE-101 round-9 fix (2026-05-06): the audit target of ≥5 compound-vocab cross-links per kanji is partially corpus-limited. The N5 vocab corpus contains ≥5 entries with a given glyph for only ~16 kanji. For the rest, the examples list is supplemented with curated common N5-scope compounds drawn from Genki I, Minna I+II first half, JLPT Sensei N5, and JLPT.jp 旧出題基準. Compounds where this still cannot reach ≥5 (because the kanji genuinely does not appear in standard N5-corpus compound forms) are documented below. [Updated 2026-05-06 round-9 residual: dropped from 35 to 0 after the residual-compounds pass.]
